---
author:
  - Patrick J. Roddy
  - "[James Legg](https://github.com/cjlegg)"
  - "[Kevin Mulder](https://github.com/kmulderdas)"
date: 2018-07-18
path: stfc-summer-school-in-artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning-2018/index.qmd
subtitle: >-
  [STFC's Summer School in Artificial Intelligence and Machine
  Learning](https://indico.cern.ch/event/702529)
title: Intrusion Detection from Network Logs
---

{{< pdf index.pdf height=500 width=100% >}}
